name: Falafel (Chickpea Burger)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound dried garbanzo beans or fava beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse dried beans under running water.
2. Place the beans in a slow cooker and cover with enough water (at least 2 inches above the beans).
3. Cook on low heat for 8 to 10 hours.
4. Drain the cooked beans and rinse them under cold water.
5. Add the beans, cilantro, parsley, green onions, garlic, cumin, baking soda, salt, pepper, and optional water to a food processor.
6. Pulse until the mixture is well combined but still holds together when squeezed.
7. Shape into patties and set aside.
8. Heat olive oil in a frying pan over medium heat.
9. When the oil is hot, carefully place the falafel patties in the pan.
10. Cook for 3-4 minutes on each side or until golden brown and crispy.
11. Remove from the pan and drain excess oil on paper towels before serving.
